---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement

---

## ✨ Feature Description

What do you want to add or enhance?

## 📌 Why Is This Needed?

Explain the problem this solves or the motivation behind it.

## 🔧 Suggested Implementation

Outline how this feature could be built.

## 🔗 Additional Context

Add references, links, designs, or screenshots.
